title: Retry with jittered backoff
description: Wrap flaky network calls in exponential backoff with full jitter to avoid thundering-herd retries.
rationale: Fixed delays synchronize retries across clients and re-create the outage.

name: Prefer domain types over primitives
pattern: Model IDs, temperatures, and money as distinct types so invariants are checked at compile time.

description: Cache read-heavy lookups behind a 5-minute TTL keyed by user id.
